---
title: "adjudicator.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\games\odin_protocol\engine\adjudicator.py"
loc: 77
complexity: 10
logic_score: 2.13
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 4.52
overall_score: 2.17
---

## Intent
The `adjudicator.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on process_queue, ActionAdjudicator, execute. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via process_queue, ActionAdjudicator, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 29 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.logic](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.logic)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios)

### Exports
- `process_queue`
- `ActionAdjudicator`
- `execute`
